allow: Bash(awk '/^model Conversation / {flag=1} /^model ConversationMessage/ {flag=1} /^model QuoteBroadcast/ {flag=1} /^model QuoteResponse/ {flag=1} /^}$/ {if\(flag\) print; flag=0} flag' prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(awk '/^model User /{flag=1} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; print; exit} flag' prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(awk '/^model Review /{flag=1} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; print; exit} flag' prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(awk '/^model Message /{flag=1} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; print; exit} flag' prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(awk '/^model CreditTransaction /{flag=1} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; print; exit} flag' prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(awk '/^model GoogleCalendarToken /{flag=1} flag && /^}$/{flag=0; print; exit} flag' prisma/schema.prisma)
